signals.headline: IUML Releases First List of 27 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
IUML Releases First List of 27 Candidates for Kerala Assembly Election 2026 | YES | MED confidence**

The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) has announced its initial candidate list for 25 of the 27 constituencies it plans to contest in the Kerala Legislative Assembly election scheduled for April 9, 2026, emphasizing a youth push and new faces as part of a party revamp within the UDF alliance.[1][3
